source: Published validation windows documented in docs/model.html. Regenerate with src/backtest.py when raw data is available.
interpretation: Across the four published multi-year windows, APEX+ improves over the market baseline in every window, with an average +0.083 Spearman lift and median +0.080 lift. The report is stronger than a single holdout claim, but should still be regenerated by code from raw data before treating it as final audit evidence.
